title: How to build a continuous evaluation pipeline for multi-agent systems with Gemini
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates building a continuous evaluation pipeline for multi-agent systems using Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform and Cloud Run. The approach replaces manual testing with data-driven assessment using adaptive rubrics, tool use quality metrics, shadow deployments, and CI/CD automation to prevent performance regressions in production agent systems.
